videos.headline: Texas A&M goes on the road and defeats Mississippi State
videos.description: Texas A&M goes on the road and defeats Mississippi State

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Texas A&M goes on the road and defeats Mississippi State) 2024/10/19 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Mississippi State's Davon Booth is wide open for a TD
videos.description: Mississippi State scores on fourth down as Davon Booth has no one around him for a 14-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mississippi State's Davon Booth is wide open for a TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Noah Thomas hauls in 20-yard Texas A&M TD
videos.description: Texas A&M pulls even as Conner Weigman finds Noah Thomas in the end zone for a 20-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Noah Thomas hauls in 20-yard Texas A&M TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Le'Veon Moss muscles into end zone for Texas A&M TD
videos.description: Texas A&M goes ahead as Le'Veon Moss drags tacklers into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Le'Veon Moss muscles into end zone for Texas A&M TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mississippi State's Kevin Coleman Jr. makes stellar diving catch
videos.description: Mississippi State gets close to the end zone as Kevin Coleman Jr. makes sweet diving catch for a gain of 38 yards.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mississippi State's Kevin Coleman Jr. makes stellar diving catch) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Weigman airmails receiver and throws an INT
videos.description: Texas A&M's Conner Weigman sees his pass go over his receiver's head and into the hands of Mississippi State's Hunter Washington for an interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Weigman airmails receiver and throws an INT) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas A&M responds with an INT on fourth down
videos.description: After the offense turns it over. the A&M defense gets it right back with a Scooby Williams interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas A&M responds with an INT on fourth down) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amari Daniels spins into end zone for a Texas A&M TD
videos.description: Texas A&M goes up 21-10 in the second quarter as Amari Daniels finds the end zone for a 6-yard score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Amari Daniels spins into end zone for a Texas A&M TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Van Buren rips one to Mario Craver for a Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Mississippi State scores right before the half as Michael Van Buren Jr. finds Mario Craver for a 4-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Van Buren rips one to Mario Craver for a Mississippi State TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Le'Veon Moss gives Texas A&M a 2-score lead
videos.description: Le'Veon Moss scores his second touchdown of the game as he finds the end zone from 3-yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Le'Veon Moss gives Texas A&M a 2-score lead) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Zakari Tillman picks off Conner Weigman in the fourth quarter
videos.description: Texas A&M turns it over as his pass is intercepted by Zakari Tillman.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zakari Tillman picks off Conner Weigman in the fourth quarter) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Coleman Jr. runs over defender for Mississippi State TD
videos.description: Mississippi State's Kevin Coleman Jr. hauls in the short catch and runs through a defender at the goal line for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Coleman Jr. runs over defender for Mississippi State TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
